name: Mayur Uniquoters Limited
summary: Mayur Uniquoters Limited manufactures and sells coated textile fabrics in India and internationally. The company's products include artificial leather/foam leather and other substitutes of leather. Its products are used in footwear, furnishings, automotive OEM, automotive replacement, and automotive exports markets. Mayur Uniquoters Limited was incorporated in 1992 and is based in Jaipur, India.
